title: callaeum psilophyllum
side_effects: Callaeum psilophyllum can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive issues in some individuals. Prolonged consumption of its extracts can lead to headaches, dizziness, and nausea due to its high alkaloid content. In rare cases, excessive use of Callaeum psilophyllum has been linked to increased heart rate, blood pressure, and respiratory problems. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for medicinal purposes to avoid any potential health risks.
